content.en:
"Next, let's go all out to comprehend one Tao and strive to master hundreds of millions of changes. "

Ye Tian decided.

In the following years, Ye Tian tried his best to comprehend the changes in the way of space, with the assistance of two Ten Thousand Phase statues, coupled with the secret of enlightenment, the effect of his comprehension was not low.

However, he had already mastered tens of millions of changes in the Dao of Space, and if he continued to master more changes, it would naturally be very difficult.

But Ye Tian at least still had hope of mastering it, but it took a long time.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to practice enlightenment.

Time passed, and several members of the Restoration Sect never appeared again, obviously for an incomparably long time, they were afraid that they would disappear completely and never reappear.

Ye Tian didn't care about this matter anymore, and gradually immersed himself in cultivation.

Three hundred million years later.

After such a long time, Ye Tian has finally made great progress on top of the changes in the Dao of Space.

At this moment, Ye Tian had already controlled hundreds of millions of spatial dao changes.

"It's so difficult!" Ye Tian said with emotion.

With his qualifications and understanding, it would take 300 million realm river years to master the hundreds of millions of changes of a Dao, and if he wanted to master the hundreds of millions of changes of thousands of Dao, even if he used the Boundary River year as a unit of time, it would be an astronomical amount.

One can imagine how difficult it is for those Eternal Masters who are still talented to progress, and they may not even have made any progress in the past billion realms.

Therefore, many eternal masters will not care about the inheritance of the Heaven Snatching Technique, and will frantically cultivate the Heaven Snatching Technique.

"Next, try to create a top-notch Origin Mastery. It takes less time to transform and improve on the basis of those few Origin Control Techniques and create a top-notch Origin Control Technique. Ye Tian thought to himself.

And so.

Ye Tian made every effort to transform and perfect the origin control technique of air shock, and made every effort to perfect and transform it.

Now, Ye Tian has mastered hundreds of millions of changes in the Dao of Space, and has gradually discovered that the changes in the Origin Control Technique of Void Shock are somewhat few, and some places are not very good.

That is to say, the vision is high, and many problems can be seen at a glance.

With Ye Tian's continuous efforts, the air shock has been continuously improved.

In the blink of an eye, 10 million realm river years have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian perfected the air shock to the level of the top origin control technique.

At the moment when the air shock was perfected successfully, Ye Tian felt that the shackles in the underworld were shattered by himself, and his own aura changed dramatically.

"Seven Realms Level Master!"

Ye Tian smiled very happily.

After cultivating for such a long time, he has finally reached the Seven Realms level master, and if he urges the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, it is comparable to the combat power of the Eight Realms level controller.

placed in the Origin Realm River, it can be regarded as a real high-end combat power.

And at this time, Ye Tian found that he had been moved to Wanyuan Mountain.

When he looked again, he found that the master was in front of him.

Obviously, he was moved here by his master.

Silently moving his position, he is worthy of being a master, much stronger than him.

"Meet the Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Apprentice, you have broken through to the Seven Realms level master, so I will give you a great opportunity for the master. The Ten Elements Ancestor said: "It's not just you, when a few of your senior brothers and sisters broke through to the Seven Realms level masters, they also gave great opportunities to the teacher. "

"Master, why do you give a great opportunity when you break through to the Seven Realms level master?"

Ye Tian was a little curious and asked.

The Ten Elements Ancestor explained, "Because even the Seven Realm-level controllers can't be promoted through their own efforts, then there is no value in cultivating. Although what the teacher said is very realistic, this is the truth. Of course, a few personal disciples who are masters are naturally not bad, and it is not difficult for you to be a master of the Seven Realms. "

Ye Tian also agreed with this statement, being able to be accepted as a personal disciple by the Ten Elements Ancestor was naturally not bad, and he would definitely not be stopped by the threshold of the Seven Realms level controller.

At this time, he was looking forward to what opportunities the master would give him.

However, the opportunity given by the master is definitely not small.

At this time, the Ten Elements Ancestor took out a sealing ball, and a creature was sealed inside.

The creature had countless scales, and each one had a different breath and a different color.

And when Ye Tian saw this creature, he seemed to see something terrifying, and his whole body trembled a little.

"Master, what kind of creature is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

He felt that neither the Silent Sea nor the Devouring Mountain were inferior to this creature!

Could it be that it is the mysterious life that ranks first among the special beings?

"It's called Wanxiang Lin Dragon, it is comparable to the Seven Realms level controller when it is born, and it is comparable to the Ten Realms level controller when it is an adult, and the life level is extremely high, in the same level, it takes at least ten strong people to surround and kill it. And this is a juvenile Wanxiang Lin Dragon, you can devour it, turn it into your own heritage, and even use it to directly condense the primordial control body. "

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Thank you, Master. "

Ye Tian said gratefully.

He knew very well that the Wanxiang Lin Dragon must be very rare, and even if he encountered it, he couldn't catch it!

The Wanxiang Lin Dragon, which happens to be in a juvenile state, must be very rare, and there will be elders to support it, if he dares to capture a Wanxiang Lin Dragon, it will be looking for death.

Just as Ye Tian took the sealing ball, the will perception entered the sealing ball, and he suddenly felt a familiar aura.

"Master, how can the aura of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon be somewhat similar to the Wanxiang statue?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ten Elements Ancestor said: "Because the Wanxiang Statue is actually the Reverse Dragon Lin of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon, strictly speaking, the Reverse Dragon Lin after it has faded. A 10,000-phase dragon will only fade away from nine anti-dragon lins with a single sound, and each anti-dragon lin is different. Therefore, once you gather the nine Ten Thousand Phase Statues, you can form a Ten Thousand Phase Lin Dragon Law Statue and fuse it into your body, which will make your strength skyrocket. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

At first, he thought that the Ten Thousand Phases Statue was refined by the Black Ancestor, but later he felt that it was not refined by the Black Ancestor, but he also felt that it was refined by a great being who surpassed the Ten Realms-level masters.

Now I know that it is actually the reverse dragon of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

"Master, at least the Ten Realm-level Masters will be able to take off the Reverse Dragon Dragon, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"That's true. The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded, "Actually, the Ten Thousand Phase Lin Dragons that can fade the Nine Reverse Dragon Blades are still very rare, and it is rumored that once the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragons can fade the Ten Reverse Dragon Blades ten times, they will break the restrictions of the Ten Realm-level controllers and be promoted to the level of our peers." And the Primordial Ancestor has a Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon mount, and he seems to have been studying this, I don't know if it has succeeded. "

"Master, what are the abilities of the Wanxiang Lin Dragon?"

Ye Tian was quite curious.

"After you devour it, you will know!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

Subsequently, Ye Tian retreated and began to devour and refine this Wanxiang Lin Dragon directly in Wanyuan Mountain.
